query:
SELECT 
  g.id as game_id,
  g.away_team,
  g.home_team,
  g.away_pitcher_id,
  g.home_pitcher_id,
  l.team,
  l.lineup_json
FROM mlb_games g
LEFT JOIN mlb_lineups l ON l.game_id = g.id
WHERE DATE(g.game_date) = '2026-03-26'
ORDER BY g.id, l.team
LIMIT 50;
